answer:
\boxed{The Catcher in the Rye by J.D. Salinger}

The reference on the cover of *Reclaiming Conversation* alludes to Holden Caulfield’s description of his strained, awkward interactions with others in *The Catcher in the Rye*, symbolizing the erosion of genuine connection. Turkle uses this imagery to critique modern digital communication’s impact on face-to-face relationships. The book’s cover visually mirrors the physical distancing Holden describes.
